title: Pinterest Analyst Expectations and Q1 2026 Outlook
text: Pinterest is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 16.2% and 11.2% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 17.3% per annum. Pinterest is covered by 53 analysts, providing comprehensive market coverage. Following the Q1 2026 earnings beat, Goldman Sachs led the bull camp with a Buy rating, citing Pinterest's resilience in lower-funnel advertising, healthy user engagement, SMB and mid-market strength, AI-driven ad automation, search monetization, EBITDA upside, and an increased pace of share repurchases. At least seven sell-side firms raised their price targets following the Q1 beat, reflecting optimism about the company's strategic direction.
